triggers.prompt_regex: \b(index spine|adaptive index|index manifest|query receipt|advisor proposal|context view|map artifact|training export|export validation|redaction validation|index reliability|stale index|degraded index)\b

context.directive: Use the index spine before guessing why recall or context selection is unreliable. Inspect manifests, receipts, context views, maps, and training export validation, and report remote_unavailable explicitly when the substrate MCP cannot answer.
validation_defaults: index_spine({"surface":"overview"}) returns counts plus reliability signals
index_spine({"surface":"export_validation"}) reports blocked training exports before any training handoff
